stemHtml: When is an aircraft in the heavy-wake-turbulence category required to append the word "Heavy" to its call sign (e.g. Fastair 345 Heavy)?

options.a: During the initial contact with the aerodrome control tower and the approach control unit.
options.b: It is not required because the information is already shown on the flight plan.
options.d: During every call to the tower and the approach control unit.
